name: Sherrod Brown
subject: BREAKING: Renacci is releasing a new ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:

| | You know today marks 26 days until Election Day. subject: Can Phil count on your support?
body:
With just 26 days to go until Election Day, and a campaign finance deadline TOMORROW, can we count on your support? |
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f8e1f91256&e=19cebfe173) | [Share](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d4d216f901&e=19cebfe173)
---|---

---|---

---|---
| Friend,
---
| With just 26 days to go until Election Day, and a campaign finance deadline TOMORROW, [can we count on your support?](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1fd707456e&e=19cebfe173)**I’m asking each supporter to chip in $25 so we can share the Governor’s message on TV. Can you please help us out?**

This campaign is about ensuring hard working Vermonters keep more of what they earn. It’s about electing a leader who will always do what’s right. It’s about having elected officials who treat others with dignity and respect. And, it’s about re-electing a Governor who is willing to do the hard work, prioritize investments, and make tough decisions.

We can ensure this by re-electing Governor Scott on November 6, **but we can’t do it without[your help](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=7604697bff&e=19cebfe173)!**

As always, thank you for your generosity and support.

Brittney Wilson
Campaign Manager

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Here's why I'm asking you to donate to Tina Smith before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Moment of truth.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181011PM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, Want to take back control of the Senate? Want to stop Trump's agenda in its tracks? Well, then here's the bottom line: Tina Smith's race in Minnesota is a must-win. **[But Tina can't win without your help. And now's the time to take action. Can you make your first contribution before midnight so Tina has the resources she needs to finish this must-win campaign strong?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. We know how badly Trump and his backers want to turn Minnesota red. Two years ago, he came within 1.5 points of winning the state, and now he has a chance to lock in a Republican majority by defeating Tina.
This is going to be close. Every dollar is going to matter. And we can't take anything for granted.
After all, the same wealthy dark-money donors who got Trump to the White House in 2016 are back, and now they have their sights set on anyone who stands in his way -- starting with leaders like Tina.
But we know the power that comes from grassroots donors standing up and fighting back. That's how I won my Senate race, and that's how we'll win this one: thousands of people like you doing whatever you can to push Tina across the finish line.
**[So here's the moment of truth -- are you going to step up so Tina can win this race and help Democrats take back the Senate? I need you to give all you can now.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181011PM_em-full&amount=10&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Keep fighting,
Elizabeth Warren

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Brian Kemp is blocking voter registrations. Again. We're fighting back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Here's what's going on in the news right now: |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa894/34a064cc/e2a3139/70d3f1b/2043282552/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | **Here 's what's going on in the news right now:** [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa894/34a064cc/e2a3139/70d3f18/2043282552/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDExMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-voterprotectionfund?refcode=IE101118-full") **Here 's what Stacey Abrams has to say about it:** [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa894/34a064cc/e2a3139/70d3f18/2043282552/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDExMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-voterprotectionfund?refcode=IE101118-full")
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa894/34a064cc/e2a3139/70d3f18/2043282552/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDExMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-voterprotectionfund?refcode=IE101118-full") **And here 's what you can do to fight back:** **We have a plan to make sure EVERY Georgia voter in every county can cast a ballot. But we need your help to get it done:** ****[Chip in $3 to our Voter Protection Fund NOW>>](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa894/34a064cc/e2a3139/70d3f18/2043282552/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDExMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-voterprotectionfund?refcode=IE101118-full")**** Here's how #TeamAbrams is protecting every Georgian's right to vote:
* **We 've prepared the most expansive and aggressive voter protection team in the state's history.** The Voter Protection Hotline has been up and running for more than a month to answer voters' questions and assist with any problems they experience while voting or registering to vote. The number for our Voter Protection Hotline is 1-888-730-5816. Spread the word!
* **We 've invested in close relationships with Georgia counties** and election workers across the state, who are working with our team to ensure every eligible voter is going to be able to cast their ballot this election cycle.
* **We 've learned the systems inside and out that help voters track their engagement** - everything from registering to vote to submitting absentee ballot applications and voting by mail.
* **We 've developed a system to deploy poll watchers across the state,** during in-person early voting and on Election Day, to ensure poll workers are allowing all voters to cast ballots.

This fight won't be easy, but we're ready - and with your help, we can win. ****[Chip in $3 to our Voter Protection Fund to fight back.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa894/34a064cc/e2a3139/70d3f18/2043282552/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDExMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-voterprotectionfund?refcode=IE101118-full")**** \- Team Abrams

name: PA Senate Update 2018
subject: recap of last night inside >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
**President Trump attacked Bob onstage in Erie last night** **Help Bob fight back -- rush $5 now:** [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181011_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Team -- the president stood onstage last night and lied.

After the Republicans passed their tax cuts for the top 1%, they announced plans to fix the budget hole they created by slashing programs like Medicare and Medicaid. But last night, the president claimed Republicans want to protect Medicare.

He stood in front of thousands of Pennsylvania voters and claimed that Republicans want to protect pre-existing conditions, despite leading countless attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act, which would leave millions of Americans without health care.

**_[Tell Donald Trump you see through his lies -- donate $5 or more to protect Bob today.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181011_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

This was the second time in two weeks that the president praised Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta _right here in PA_. He lauded Barletta's history in office, calling him "a total winner." If the president wins Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat, Pennsylvanians will lose their firewall against the Trump administration's disastrous, anti-middle-class agenda.

**We need Bob's voice in the Senate, now more than ever. Fight back against the president's lies -- donate $5 to defend Bob today.** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181011_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181011_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181011_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. clean_body: President Trump attacked Bob onstage in Erie last night Help Bob fight back -- rush $5 now: "" Team -- the president stood onstage last night and lied. After the Republicans passed their tax cuts for the top 1%, they announced plans to fix the budget hole they created by slashing programs like Medicare and Medicaid. But last night, the president claimed Republicans want to protect Medicare. He stood in front of thousands of Pennsylvania voters and claimed that Republicans want to protect pre-existing conditions, despite leading countless attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act, which would leave millions of Americans without health care. "" This was the second time in two weeks that the president praised Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta right here in PA. He lauded Barletta's history in office, calling him "a total winner." If the president wins Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat, Pennsylvanians will lose their firewall against the Trump administration's disastrous, anti-middle-class agenda. We need Bob's voice in the Senate, now more than ever. Fight back against the president's lies -- donate $5 to defend Bob today. name: Hurricane Michael
subject: Alabama needs your help, Friend (A message for those not hit by Hurricane Michael)
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/Logos/Logo3.PNG]

Can I be honest with you, Friend?

I need you to step up. I need you to raise $10,000 by Wednesday the 17th.

Click here to chip in $100. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Lw7E5S3uc0eS5ySIJdKd2Q2?emci=568e301b-cccd-e811-af11-2818784f20f6&emdi=b5ca20d1-23ce-e811-af11-2818784f20f6&ceid=6898985&am=&contactdata=6RBQfrvKcr9Ly0vV2Nh0IFeJhKeDbtWiChR4HjzQHZpft9Gcrr10WyH8JcOtbthK]

We are in the last 25 days of the campaign, but I have to step back from campaigning for a few days in order to help the people of my district.
Hurricane Michael was the worst storm to ever hit the Florida panhandle, and it hit us hard in the Wiregrass. (The Wiregrass is the Southeast portion of Alabama, the part of the district that borders the Florida panhandle.) Part of what made this storm so catastrophic was that, according to the Washington Post, it "maintained hurricane intensity nearly 200 miles inland."
[https://www.washingtonpost.com/national/floridas-forgotten-coast-devastated-by-historic-hurricane-michael/2018/10/11/ef9d127a-cd6f-11e8-a360-85875bac0b1f_story.html?utm_term=.46fbf491b975]

Winds of 50-60mph downed trees, many of them big enough to crush houses. Power is still out for tens of thousands people. Phone lines are still down. Schools are closed. Cotton farmers here fear they have lost most, if not all, their cotton crop for the year. Peanut farmers need the fields to dry quickly or they too will have lost their harvest.

It's a bit strange, too, because my district is so large (10,000 square miles), so the northern part of my district saw little more than a rainy day.
But right now, the Wiregrass needs me, so that's where my attention needs to be. And while I'm taking care of this emergency, I need YOU to pick up the slack. I need you to raise $10,000 by Wednesday the 17th.

Alabama needs your help. Chip in to keep the campaign moving forward. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Lw7E5S3uc0eS5ySIJdKd2Q2]

- Tabitha K.

Connect With Us:
Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/TabithaIsner]
Twitter [http://www.twitter.com/TabithaK]
Call us at 334-425-8626

Checks made out to "Friends of Tabitha Isner" can be sent to:
PO Box 6340
Montgomery, AL 36106

Campaign HQ Address:
1460 Ann St.
Montgomery, AL 36106

subject: President Trump’s List: 289 Accomplishments in Just 20 months, ‘Relentless’ Promise-Keeping
body:
| |

#
# **_President Trump’s List: 289 Accomplishments in Just 20 months, ‘Relentless’ Promise-Keeping_**
#
“The Trump administration’s often overlooked list of achievements has surpassed those of former President Reagan at this time and more than doubled since the last tally of accomplishments after his first year in office,” Paul Bedard writes in the _Washington Examiner_. As the President nears the two-year mark of his historic election, “the administration has counted up 289 accomplishments in 18 categories, capped by the confirmation of Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court.” “Trump’s successes in reducing the cost of taxes and regulations, rebuilding our military, avoiding wars of choice and changing the courts rival those of all previous Republican presidents,” American for Tax Reform President Grover Norquist said. **[Click here to read more.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEyLjk2MTUzNTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMi45NjE1MzU1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5NzY5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/washington-secrets/trumps-list-289-accomplishments-in-just-20-months-relentless-promise-keeping) ** “President Trump said Hurricane Michael packed ‘tremendous power’ on its destructive path through Florida and Georgia, but fortunately is moving quickly so emergency crews can begin their work,” Dave Boyer reports for [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEyLjk2MTUzNTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMi45NjE1MzU1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5NzY5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/11/trump-destruction-hurricane-michael-not-seen-long/). “Mr. Trump said the Federal Emergency Management Agency, state authorities and electric company crews have already moved in to repair damage and help those left homeless.” “Nearly twice as many registered voters said they thought President Trump was responsible for the current state of the economy compared to those who credited former President Obama,” Julia Manchester reports in [**_The Hill_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEyLjk2MTUzNTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMi45NjE1MzU1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5NzY5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://thehill.com/hilltv/what-americas-thinking/411004-twice-as-many-credit-trump-over-obama-with-economy-says-hilltv). “The poll, conducted by Hill.TV and the HarrisX polling company, found that 49 percent of respondents attributed today's economy to Trump, while 24 percent of respondents credited Obama.” “President Donald Trump added his signature to the ‘Save Our Seas Act’ on Thursday, green-lighting an initiative to clean up eight million tons of debris from the planet’s oceans,” Jason Hopkins reports for [**_The Daily Caller_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEyLjk2MTUzNTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMi45NjE1MzU1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5NzY5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://dailycaller.com/2018/10/11/trump-signs-bill-clean-ocean/?utm_source=Twitter&utm_medium=Social&utm_campaign=atdailycaller&__twitter_impression=true&__twitter_impression=true). “As president I will continue to do everything I can to stop other nations from making our oceans into their landfills,” President Trump said. “President Trump signed the eagerly anticipated Music Modernization Act into law at a ceremony at the White House on Thursday, in the most high-profile event for the music industry in several years,” Amy X. Wang writes in [**_Rolling Stone_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEyLjk2MTUzNTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMi45NjE1MzU1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5NzY5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.rollingstone.com/music/music-news/trump-signs-music-modernization-act-736185/). President Trump called the MMA a milestone that would “close loopholes” in copyright law and help songwriters get paid. “They were treated very unfairly. They’re not going to be treated unfairly anymore,” the President added.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEyLjk2MTUzNTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMi45NjE1MzU1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5NzY5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEyLjk2MTUzNTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMi45NjE1MzU1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5NzY5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEyLjk2MTUzNTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMi45NjE1MzU1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk5NzY5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
---

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: Helping our neighbors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/46jY3F-v4LzOAadAwIQEow0M9SPURTTXKza7sa62WUk=/M43giBAXJX_DR7BTvNsbpGhie2aEXhzMHuO1JfvexMk=) Friends and Neighbors -- As more pictures and videos surface showing the devastation of Hurricane Michael -- my heart can't help but break for families and communities throughout the Panhandle. Thousands of our fellow Floridians no longer have a home to go back to and thousands more are without power, supplies, and basic necessities. It is easy to feel helpless. **But all of us can help. **

From now until October 17th, you can drop off water, canned goods, and other supplies directly to Andrew Gillum for Governor field office locations throughout the State. You can look up the nearest location **[here](https://act.myngp.com/el/46jY3F-v4LzOAadAwIQEow0M9SPURTTXKza7sa62WUk=/c_Cz3L5awevvz5L5bIAXkSJzKwoJfzE6xTQlW5axfDg=?refcode=website)**. If you can't drop off supplies, you can also give directly to the Red Cross, which is directing vital resources for care, shelter and restoration in the areas and to the individuals impacted. Your donation will go a long way in saving lives and helping our neighbors get back on their feet. [<< Help those impacted by Hurricane Michael. Give to the Red Cross Today >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/46jY3F-v4LzOAadAwIQEow0M9SPURTTXKza7sa62WUk=/ciNkn6EhfTmvspKhyD8oTElm7FQSH3Rnm-61Ch8W2VQ=?cid=fy19hurmichael&med=cpc&source=google&scode=rsg00000e017&gclid=Cj0KCQjw6fvdBRCbARIsABGZ-vQtLM_osmeiU-iZPJRuArskhGsbSeW_9EqMuUw835mnkr6sey4HyuoaAoj5EALw_wcB&gclsrc=aw.ds&dclid=CIGg0Yit_90CFQnPZAodU24FhA) If there's one thing I've learned from living in Florida, it's that we always rebuild, overcome, and take care of our own. **Hurricane Michael might have been strong, but Florida is stronger**. Thank you for all you do, thank you for giving - **and please, stay safe out there!** **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---
Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer
PO Box 670311
Coral Springs FL 33067 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/46jY3F-v4LzOAadAwIQEow0M9SPURTTXKza7sa62WUk=/oWXHp7F7bVgC3A0U6BdxZHodwqkBunrLA_nK7xDml2Y=).

name: Chris McNamara, Team Mahony
subject: Friend , Did You See Josh's Email
body:
Friend,
On Wednesday, Josh sent out a powerful note about how important it is for us as Arkansans to stick up for our values. His debate with Steve Womack could not have drawn a more clear line between the two candidates.
Our team is fighting hard for every person in Northwest Arkansas, regardless of party affiliation, the size of their paycheck or where they got their start in life. Josh asked that we try to hit $10,000 by midnight tonight and we are almost halfway there.
**I looked over the numbers and we are about $5,897 dollars short. We can make this happen with your help. Your contribution will allow us to put more resources into our Get Out The Vote program. Our volunteers need more campaign lit, more signs and more snacks to sustain them as they spread Josh's message across the district.**
__**I need you to chip in today, before midnight, with as much as you can. This is a major deadline for us and we need you today.**__
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2603739/15573311/-1826915792?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWFjZTk4OS0zNWNlLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03hJfBXJOlpfJ2B4qeKzqzjW5nysjmVE5SkmDBsegQI=)
Chris McNamara
Campaign Manager, Mahony for Congress

Friend,
It's Wednesday morning, but I'm still riding high from my debate with Steve Womack. Unlike most folks in Northwest Arkansas, I got to talk issues with our congressman face to face. I am so grateful to be able to deliver the message for working families, farmers, seniors and the small businesses that make up the 3rd district. I did my best to lay out the vision for our communities and our country that we talk about everyday on front porches and in diners and at events from Fayetteville to Fort Smith and all points in between.
_**One thing I noticed was that Congressman Womack stuck by his values. He made the case to Arkansans that tax cuts for millionaires matter more than fully funding Medicare for seniors. Womack defended his position to make healthcare more difficult to access if you have a pre-existing condition. And Steve Womack never mentioned once why he won't vote to renew the Violence Against Women Act, that protects our mothers, wives, daugthers and sisters from domestic abuse.**_
Those might be his values, but they aren't mine and I know they aren't yours. The debate shows you two different people with very different views of who we are and who we can become. I hope that you side with me.
I have set a goal to raise $10,000 in online contributions by this Friday. Since the debate, we have felt a shift in momentum and we need to capitalize on it. I need you and your friends and co-workers and anyone else concerned about our country to chip in today. Can I count on you to help me hit this goal? With less than 30 days away from election day, I need you more than ever before.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2603740/15573312/-1826915792?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWFjZTk4OS0zNWNlLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03hJfBXJOlpfJ2B4qeKzqzjW5nysjmVE5SkmDBsegQI=)
Josh

If you believe you received this message in error, please unsubscribe to this list.
Mahony for Congress
P.O. Box 1884
Fayetteville, AR 72702
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/450db512-34ce-e811-af11-2818784f20f6/eaace989-35ce-e811-af11-2818784f20f6?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWFjZTk4OS0zNWNlLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03hJfBXJOlpfJ2B4qeKzqzjW5nysjmVE5SkmDBsegQI=&id=110671788&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

**Friends: With just 25 days until Election Day, we're so close to electing Molly Kelly as the next governor of New Hampshire!**
**But now the real work begins. **With wealthy special interests bankrolling Chris Sununu here in the Granite State, **there's never been more at stake.**

That's why Molly is refusing to accept any corporate donations. **She's accountable to families like yours - not special interests.** But that means Molly needs grassroots donors like you to take back the corner office for Democrats in November.

**We need 1,000 Election Year Members immediately to compete with the special interests of Chris Sununu, but right now, we're not quite there yet.**

name: Bob Corney, Bredesen Campaign Manager
subject: Here’s why I have to ask
body:
|
#
Peter -- Despite our strong momentum heading into the final weeks of this campaign, dark-money groups led by Mitch McConnell and out-of-state billionaires like the Koch Brothers are spending millions of dollars on false attacks to buy this race. With only days left until voters go to the polls, we can’t afford to let Governor Bredesen’s positive message of working together to get things done get drowned out by this flood of attack ads. That’s why I have to ask: **Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can so we have the resources we’ll need to tune out these attacks? name: Sherrod Brown
subject: counter the Trump bump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Trump will be in Ohio today, campaigning for my opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci. And this morning, Renacci launched his first campaign ad of the general election. Every time Trump shares the stage with Renacci, more money pours into his campaign coffers. And that money goes to fund ads like the ones launched today. Trump and Renacci want me to lose my job. **I need your help, today, to keep it.** [**We need to raise $15,000 in our Emergency Response Fund before midnight tonight to counteract the Trump bump Renacci is about to get. Can you rush in a contribution?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe98/4462dc26/7dfa2195/20186d16/371566152/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDEyYW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181012am?refcode=sbe181012am_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe98/4462dc26/7dfa2195/20186d15/371566152/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDEyYW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181012am?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181012am_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe98/4462dc26/7dfa2195/20186d15/371566152/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDEyYW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181012am?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181012am_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe98/4462dc26/7dfa2195/20186d15/371566152/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDEyYW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181012am?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181012am_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe98/4462dc26/7dfa2195/20186d16/371566152/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDEyYW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181012am?refcode=sbe181012am_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Early voting has already started here in Ohio. Trump, Vice President Pence, and the special interests all think they can make a difference. Trump wouldn't keep coming to Ohio if he didn't think he was making a difference in turnout. Renacci thinks Ohio is a "Trump state." And, unfortunately, recent polling shows he may be right -- our race is getting tighter. But we know the truth: we know that Ohio isn't a red state or a blue state. We're the Buckeye State -- full of workers, seniors, students, small business owners, and so many more, all of whom expect their elected leaders to fight for them. **I fight like hell for Ohioans in the Senate.** That's my job, and I'll continue to do it as long as I have the honor of holding this office. [**Rush in a contribution to get us to this $15,000 goal.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe98/4462dc26/7dfa2195/20186d16/371566152/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDEyYW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181012am?refcode=sbe181012am_m_other&refcode2=3268183") I know with you on this grassroots team, we can defeat Renacci and win. With gratitude, Sherrod
---

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: We just made history (again)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

We just hit send on this press release (copied below), and I wanted to be
sure that you’re the first to see it:

From July to September of 2018, the Beto for Texas campaign raised more
than $38.1 million from 802,836 contributions. All people. No PACs.

This is astounding. Not only did we more than triple what Ted Cruz raised
but we also set a new record for the largest fundraising quarter in a
Senate race. Ever. We’re breaking records and making history -- together.

Texans from all walks of life are contributing to Beto’s campaign.
Hundreds of thousands of people from all across Texas are all pitching in
$5, $10, $25 at a time to elect Beto to the U.S. Senate.

But we can’t afford to slow down even for one second. Recent polls show
Beto within single digits of Ted Cruz -- and eleven (11!!) outside groups
have pledged to pour millions into Texas to try to stop our momentum.

Don’t let them buy this election that we’ve worked so hard to win. Join
the hundreds of thousands of people who have contributed what they can
afford to Beto’s grassroots campaign. Add your first donation of
$3
on this historic day for our campaign.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/11362?refcode=em20181012&t=1019&akid=17585%2E444211%2EX6pEqF ]Contribute
$3
»

With only 25 days until Election Day, every dollar will go directly into
our campaign and help to mobilize the largest get out the vote operation
in Texas history. Help us make this happen.

With your support, I know we can win. We have to.

Jody Casey
Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/11362?refcode=em20181012&t=1020&akid=17585%2E444211%2EX6pEqF ]Contribute
$3
»

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Original email from Press@Betofortexas.com, October 12, 2018

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Friday, Oct. 12, 2018

POWERED BY 802,836 INDIVIDUAL CONTRIBUTIONS, BETO O’ROURKE’S NO-PAC CAMPAIGN
RAISES MORE THAN $38,100,000 DURING THE THIRD QUARTER, SETTING THE RECORD FOR
LARGEST FUNDRAISING QUARTER IN A SENATE RACE

EL PASO, TEXAS -- Beto O’Rourke announced that his grassroots campaign
raised more than $38,100,000 in the third quarter of 2018. Powered by
802,836 individual contributions and without a dime from PACs,
corporations or special interests, his people-powered campaign has just
set a new record for the largest fundraising quarter ever in a U.S. Senate
race.

“The people of Texas in all 254 counties are proving that when we reject
PACs and come together not as Republicans or Democrats but as Texans and
Americans, there’s no stopping us,” said O’Rourke. “This is a historic
campaign of people: all people, all the time, everywhere, every single day
-- that’s how we’re going to win this election and do something incredible
for Texas and our country at this critical moment.”

With a majority of the fundraising coming from Texas, O’Rourke’s historic
third quarter was more than three times what Ted Cruz and his affiliated
PACs raised in the same three month period. That makes this the sixth FEC
reporting period where O’Rourke’s no-PAC campaign has outraised the junior
senator. Last quarter, the El Paso Congressman raised $10.4 million, more
than doubling what Cruz raised.

O’Rourke has continued to visit every part of the state to meet with those
he wants to serve and represent. Following his travels to each one of the
254 counties, O’Rourke completed a 34-day, 7,000 mile grassroots drive
across the state to lead open dialogues with Republicans, Democrats,
Independents and non-voters alike. O’Rourke then visited more than a dozen
college and university campuses as part of his “Fight for our Future” tour
to meet with students.

As O’Rourke continues to break fundraising records, he has also built the
largest field operation in Texas history. On Saturday, his campaign will
launch a weekend of action with the two-day goal of knocking 102,733 doors
and making 102,733 phone calls. Today’s fundraising news follows the Cook
Political Report moving the Senate race's rating from "Lean Republican" to
"Toss Up." Recent polling has also shown a single digit race that is
regularly within the margin of error.

###

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181012footer&t=1021&akid=17585%2E444211%2EX6pEqF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=17585%2E444211%2EX6pEqF

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

Hey team,

**With just under a month left until election day, the _Washington Post_ revealed that President Trump has a favorite candidate: Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta.** That's not a surprise. President Trump and Congressman Barletta are in lockstep when it comes to supporting dangerous and divisive policies that harm Pennsylvanians.

They both celebrated corporate tax cuts at the expense of the middle class, they are determined to continue their assault on Medicare and Medicaid and they both want to strip protections away from people with pre-existing conditions.

**Bob is fighting back against the GOP 's dangerous agenda, but he needs your help. President Trump and Congressman Barletta campaigned together AGAIN this week, and they attacked Bob. Chip in $5 to help keep President Trump's favorite candidate out of the Senate.**

**_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181012_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks. | | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?

body:
Behind where we need to be.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181012AM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") **Friend, a new NBC News/Marist Poll was just released and it shows a shocking 9% of voters are still undecided.** We have to communicate with these voters and share what's at stake right now, but we're falling short of our weekly goal. Hitting this goal -- or falling short -- will determine whether we have the budget to keep our ads on the air and our organizers out talking to voters. I'm counting on you, team. name: Jason Yates
subject: SCOTUS WATCH #7
body:
| | Critical Supreme Court Updates from a Faith Perspective
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr34Zzdh4XIr1hkn3zv6j2BpZ5XwMPqkAH-GcqfVzH4IeQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181012com01&n=1)
|
### **Court Confirmations:**
Justice Brett Kavanaugh has been confirmed and is now presiding over cases in the U.S. Supreme Court. In his White House swearing-in ceremony, Justice Kavanaugh addressed the nation: “My approach to judging remains the same. A good judge must be an umpire, a neutral and impartial decider. A judge must interpret the law, not make the law.” Kavanaugh is expected to be a more consistent conservative and cement a five-justice conservative majority. Most observers believe Kavanaugh will uphold greater abortion restrictions and favor greater protection for religious freedom affecting generations to come. The Senate has also confirmed additional appointments to the lower courts, now being reshaped to solidify our country’s commitment to upholding the Constitution. To date under this administration, the United States Senate has confirmed 69 judges:
* **2 Associate Justices** to the Supreme Court: Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh
* **26** to the United States Courts of Appeals
* **41** to the United States District Courts

### **Supreme Court Case Update:**
The Supreme Court began the 2018-2019 term on October 1, hearing oral arguments. There were six cases Kavanaugh did not hear oral arguments for, since he was confirmed on October 6, and therefore will likely not participate in the final vote. Here are three key cases out of the ten cases the Supreme Court has heard oral arguments for so far this month:
#### **Case 1: Weyerhaeuser v. U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service**
The case is concerning 1,500-acres of privately owned land in Louisiana that the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service have designated as a critical habitat for the dusky gopher frog under the Endangered Species Act. The current designation requires the landowners to stop timber activities on the property and to populate the land with frogs. The landowners are challenging the designation since the frogs are found in Mississippi and were believed to be on the land in question back in the 1960s. The central question in this case - [does the Endangered Species Act (ESA) allow designation as a critical habitat of private land if that is not currently a habitat or essential to the species conservation? ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hKk7n_wXeztFWMg53iB8FLkh0fa-HnCS0okvaMI9XdURlYCNqS1S3SdyYyr0hfRAJUAUiYRol5aP-k50X_Qe6M3dVuB7rUuotkQiHwfBxH5y&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181012com01&n=2)Oral arguments for this case were heard on October 1, 2018.
#### **Case 2: Mount Lemmon Fire District v. Guido**
The Age Discrimination in Employment Act (ADEA) was enacted in 1967 and applied to businesses with 25 employees or more. Just seven years later the act was amended to apply to all companies with 20 employees or more and a section of the law said the act applied to “a State or political subdivision of a State and any agency or instrumentality of a State.” The central question in this case - [does the 20-employee minimum that the ADEA applies to private employers also apply to state political subdivisions?](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hMZuPHpu2jkJY5OXY9l0fuD_g9JIFnhZPlIRL2GU_6lOTXJjygcOclNodLlb6eKDxQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181012com01&n=3) Oral arguments for this case were heard on October 1, 2018.
#### **Case 3: Nielsen v. Preap**
The Immigration and Naturalization Act requires the government to detain non-citizen residents who are convicted of certain crimes when they are released from criminal custody. In three specific lawsuits filed, the government detained residents after their release from criminal custody, but not “immediately” after their release from criminal custody. The central question in this case, [“Whether a criminal alien becomes exempt from mandatory detention under 8 U.S.C. 1226(c) if, after the alien is released from criminal custody, the Department of Homeland Security does not take him into immigration custody immediately."](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hKRvZWSoKv3qCPbg83F3dWYbCTH0FFWQzFGMLL5qq9oi&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181012com01&n=4) Oral arguments heard on October 10, 2018. Please continue to pray for the Supreme Court as they hear oral arguments again on October 29th - 31st.
* * *

clean_body: | | Critical Supreme Court Updates from a Faith Perspective | Court Confirmations: Justice Brett Kavanaugh has been confirmed and is now presiding over cases in the U.S. Supreme Court. In his White House swearing-in ceremony, Justice Kavanaugh addressed the nation: “My approach to judging remains the same. A good judge must be an umpire, a neutral and impartial decider. A judge must interpret the law, not make the law.” Kavanaugh is expected to be a more consistent conservative and cement a five-justice conservative majority. Most observers believe Kavanaugh will uphold greater abortion restrictions and favor greater protection for religious freedom affecting generations to come. The Senate has also confirmed additional appointments to the lower courts, now being reshaped to solidify our country’s commitment to upholding the Constitution. To date under this administration, the United States Senate has confirmed 69 judges: 2 Associate Justices to the Supreme Court: Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh 26 to the United States Courts of Appeals 41 to the United States District Courts Supreme Court Case Update: The Supreme Court began the 2018-2019 term on October 1, hearing oral arguments. There were six cases Kavanaugh did not hear oral arguments for, since he was confirmed on October 6, and therefore will likely not participate in the final vote. Here are three key cases out of the ten cases the Supreme Court has heard oral arguments for so far this month: Case 1: Weyerhaeuser v. U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service The case is concerning 1,500-acres of privately owned land in Louisiana that the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service have designated as a critical habitat for the dusky gopher frog under the Endangered Species Act. The current designation requires the landowners to stop timber activities on the property and to populate the land with frogs. The landowners are challenging the designation since the frogs are found in Mississippi and were believed to be on the land in question back in the 1960s. The central question in this case - arguments for this case were heard on October 1, 2018. Case 2: Mount Lemmon Fire District v. Guido The Age Discrimination in Employment Act (ADEA) was enacted in 1967 and applied to businesses with 25 employees or more. Just seven years later the act was amended to apply to all companies with 20 employees or more and a section of the law said the act applied to “a State or political subdivision of a State and any agency or instrumentality of a State.” The central question in this case - Oral arguments for this case were heard on October 1, 2018. Case 3: Nielsen v. Preap The Immigration and Naturalization Act requires the government to detain non-citizen residents who are convicted of certain crimes when they are released from criminal custody. In three specific lawsuits filed, the government detained residents after their release from criminal custody, but not “immediately” after their release from criminal custody. The central question in this case, Oral arguments heard on October 10, 2018. Please continue to pray for the Supreme Court as they hear oral arguments again on October 29th - 31st. My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics. * ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: David Ortiz, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: How we win:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
|
---
[ ](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a03b/5e076a9e/54c3b459/1442506e/1934871171/VEsH/ "http://ginaraimondo.com")

| | Hello friend, **When you get right down to it, elections come down to who turns out to vote.** **If more Rhode Islanders who want positive change come out and vote, our state will keep moving forward.** We will keep rebuilding our roads and bridges, fixing our schools, and ensuring that every Rhode Islander can keep up and get ahead in today's economy. **But if one of Gina Raimondo 's opponents wins on Tuesday, November 6, all our progress is at risk.** Allan Fung and Joe Trillo oppose the changes Governor Raimondo is making to create jobs, fix roads and bridges, invest in public education and make college more affordable. They won't stand up to protect Rhode Islanders against President Trump's attacks on quality, affordable healthcare. There's too much at risk for Rhode Island in this election. We've come too far; we can't afford to go backwards. **We need your help to keep Rhode Island moving forward.** **[Will you do your part to Get Out The Vote by clicking here and registering for a canvass in your neighborhood or to make phone calls from home?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a03b/5e076a9e/54c3b459/14425061/1934871171/VEsE/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ridems/")** Thank you, David David Ortiz

body:
Hi -- I wanted to make sure you saw Amy's note below.

These may be troubling times, but over the past two weeks, Amy showed us what true leadership looks like. And with President Trump targeting Minnesota, we need her voice now more than ever.

**Will you read what Amy had to say and then make a donation to her reelection campaign?**

\-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Amy Klobuchar
Subject: President Trump's rally in Rochester

Hi,
President Trump was in Rochester last night.
It's his second campaign trip to Minnesota this election and just more proof that he's targeting our state in November, including my great colleague Tina Smith.
Remember what I've said all along: **we 're not just resisting, we're _insisting_ on a better way forward for Minnesota and the nation.**
So despite the rhetoric in Rochester, we'll be hanging on to our Minnesota values: hard work, getting things done, and treating each other with grace and dignity.
Because when we remember that we're all in this together, we can find common ground, break through the bickering, and get results.
**With the President targeting Minnesota, I need your help. Will you make a donation today?**

name: Team Scholten
subject: Steve King's Politics of Smear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
We’ve talked frequently about Steve King’s politics of division and fear, and over the last two days, he has showcased exactly what that means. It was recently announced that Senator Bernie Sanders and former HUD Secretary Julián Castro would be coming to Iowa to join J.D. Scholten for campaign events.
King’s response?
**On Wednesday, King’s official campaign Facebook page released a fundraising video reminiscent of the Red Scare tactics of the McCarthy era.** The video photoshops an image of Bernie Sanders in front of a Soviet Russian flag while blasting a song from the Red Army Choir, the official choir of the Russian Armed Forces—apparently, we’re supposed to forget that it was actually Steve King who visited Moscow a few years ago and, according to U.S. officials, “asked a diplomat to arrange for a ‘Chinese masseuse’ to be sent to his room.” Here’s a screenshot from the Team King video:
The video closes with a graphic suggesting people can “**TRIGGER LEFTIES** ” by “**DONATING TODAY**.”
[**_Chip in what you can today, not to “trigger righties,” but to help elect J.D. Scholten, who wants to bring people from all parties together to build this district’s future!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2607629/15603587/-1441556293?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWE0ZjdhNi00ZWNlLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TlvQjvKlXh3XUZsF0iFEYrspO31IeOVPytoc5XA2kSs=&refcode=express_lane_other)
As if this reprehensible video wasn’t enough, King followed up yesterday with a disgraceful tweet attacking the ethnicity of Julián Castro.
Bernie Sanders has served as the mayor of Burlington, Vermont, a member of the U.S. House of Representatives, and a U.S. Senator.
Julián Castro served as the mayor of San Antonio, Texas, and as the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development under President Obama.
These men deserve to be treated with respect, and not used as political pawns in Steve King’s constant attempts to scare voters and divide us along party lines.
**Show Steve King that his shameful and embarrassing campaign methods won’t be tolerated by making a contribution today!**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically processed:_

name: Ashley Walukevich
subject: Did you see this?
body:

Get involved NOW by knocking on doors, making phone calls and talking to voters about our Republican ticket. With only**** days counting away**until Election Day** , take action this upcoming weekend to stop the "Blue Wave" and show just how strong we are. [Join us by registering through our GOTV Weekend of Action website here!](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyPNQ3FpbapPyUeOEMG-2BenNv-2FQZ-2Frtv-2BNpjMKn51LB1lN_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MSdhGITdebdEva-2FN3gWmXKmjG3yEGtIgLmHxC6FPZr7Jkm2qMWVx9qGD9ljhhe7KY4-2FzMSF-2FrUDot-2FC8rALci1TE-2BHoI9y0eeKndK-2BoP-2BOPD0NveUnAMkMUaFD92-2BE0fEtpN0IQKxjjk3ne8FjS7y9NwZxSflZ-2B1FY-2FT9QoyECnzUBNzkK3JOxH3mqQ3yRMIHf0WgISQGssYYAri5I0-2B2hTZ6ROVoc1qp1V4xm4amMgN1vFMnUq-2FgPIPagN2AaP-2BLdJ1I0goCMRPzdQSoqzMnfA-3D-3D) Sincerely, Ashley Walukevich RNC State Director New Hampshire P.S. name: TimKaine.com
subject: "utter toss-ups"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
The bad news is that close races mean close margins, which is especially tough to overcome in traditionally Republican districts.-----------------------------------------------------------------------
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1004/3e0906/766b16b7/3e378ed4/1306159251/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181012_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND&source=20181012_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **Derek, some really great news:**

We're in the homestretch and Virginia is poised for some groundbreaking races - both Abigail Spanberger in the 7th District and Elaine Luria in the 2nd District are in _utter toss-ups_ against their Republican opponents in "red" districts.

**But the bad news is that close races mean close margins, which is especially tough to overcome in traditionally Republican districts.**

Derek, we need to register more voters to help with the tight margins in these districts and all over Virginia. [The voter registration deadline is less than three days away and we need to raise $26,961 more to finish our critical voter registration program strong.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1004/3e0906/766b16b7/3e37812e/1306159251/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181012_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+The+voter+registration+deadline+is+less+&utm_campaign=20181012_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND&source=20181012_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1004/3e0906/766b16b7/3e37812d/1306159251/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181012_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20181012_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND&source=20181012_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND") **Can you help and chip in $5 to get us to $50,000 by the end of the day Monday? Derek, in 2017 we saw the benefits of bringing new voters into the political process and empowering them to lift up local representation that looks like and thinks like them.

In order to continue that on a larger scale, we need to make sure we have the resources to reach more Virginians in the next three days than we have in the past few months combined.

**We have a plan to do that on the ground, but will you help us fill our Get Out the Vote fund so we can finance it?**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Get-Out-the-Vote-Fund](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1004/3e0906/766b16b7/3e37813e/1306159251/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181012_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+httpssecuretimkainecomGetOuttheVoteFund&utm_campaign=20181012_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND&source=20181012_1_FR_TEAM_bad-LDND")

_Team Kaine_

clean_body: The bad news is that close races mean close margins, which is especially tough to overcome in traditionally Republican districts.----------------------------------------------------------------------- | "" | | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, some really great news: We're in the homestretch and Virginia is poised for some groundbreaking races - both Abigail Spanberger in the 7th District and Elaine Luria in the 2nd District are in utter toss-ups against their Republican opponents in "red" districts. But the bad news is that close races mean close margins, which is especially tough to overcome in traditionally Republican districts. Derek, we need to register more voters to help with the tight margins in these districts and all over Virginia. "" "" Can you help and chip in $5 to get us to $50,000 by the end of the day Monday? This will help cover the costs of our statewide voter registration, education, and turn out program for Virginia House Democrats and Senator Tim Kaine: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Derek, in 2017 we saw the benefits of bringing new voters into the political process and empowering them to lift up local representation that looks like and thinks like them. In order to continue that on a larger scale, we need to make sure we have the resources to reach more Virginians in the next three days than we have in the past few months combined. We have a plan to do that on the ground, but will you help us fill our Get Out the Vote fund so we can finance it? "" Your support truly makes a world of difference, Team Kaine "" | "" "" ""

name: Mel Hall
subject: The stakes are high
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friend,

We're less than a month out from Election Day and the stakes couldn't be higher.

The results of this election will determine whether the mess in Washington will continue or whether we'll flip this district and get Congress working for Hoosiers again.

[I need you to help keep this campaign going till November 6. Chip in $25 now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/C991BbIIgWvy2DBA9XIUwToyfZy-B38Y3VuSeNXV7og=/Osw3lIMXhTSyAKtRwxkrAyeuRD3AlW02dD73cGcSQzY=?refcode=em181012)

If we fall short in this race, the people of northern Indiana will be stuck with a representative who caters to corporate special interests at the expense of hardworking Hoosiers.

But we've had enough -- we won't stand for someone who puts our interests last. That's why I'm running for Congress.

I'm ready to get to work on day one fixing the mess in Washington, fighting to expand health care access, and protecting Social Security and Medicare.

[_**We 're doing everything we can to flip this district in this final month before the election. But it just can't happen without your support. Can you contribute $25 now?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/C991BbIIgWvy2DBA9XIUwToyfZy-B38Y3VuSeNXV7og=/Osw3lIMXhTSyAKtRwxkrAyeuRD3AlW02dD73cGcSQzY=?refcode=em181012)

Thanks for standing with me in this fight,

Mel Hall

name: Travis Tazelaar
subject: Ben just walked off the stage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
It's more obvious than ever what's at stake.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37883b/7ab0e2c4/7e037374/3498069c/2584730799/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-stark-contrast?refcode=OHQ10128A") Friend, Ben and Governor Hogan just finished their candidate forum at the Maryland Municipal League Fall Conference -- and once again, Ben's plan for Maryland stood in stark contrast with Larry Hogan's. What Ben sees for Maryland is a progressive future, one with affordable, accessible, quality healthcare for everyone, fully funded public schools, and vibrant and safe neighborhoods where families thrive. Larry Hogan sees more of the same: A state that's falling behind its neighbors, where the inequality gap is growing and access to opportunity is shrinking. Where "good enough" is the motto, and "great" is off the table. That's not the Maryland I want, and I know it's not the one you want either. We can do better together, but with less a month left until Election Day, every dollar counts. With only 25 days left until Election Day, a group of donors announced that they are willing to **_[match every online donation up to $15,000 in advance of our last big filing deadline next Wednesday](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181012_fr2_s2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**.

Democrats have a path to take back the Senate majority this year, but everyone agrees that we need to win here in Pennsylvania to have a shot. name: Phil Bredesen
subject: False, misleading attacks against me
body:
|
#
Peter -- The dark-money attacks are now in full swing here in Tennessee. Congresswoman Blackburn, Super PACs, and Washington partisans are flooding the airwaves with millions of dollars in false and misleading attacks against me and my record. **Look, I’d rather be talking about ideas: how to expand health care access, how to make college more affordable, and how to stop the opioid epidemic.** While the Washington swamp wants to dominate this race with hyper-partisan shouting, I want to talk about how to help people -- and I’m going to keep on doing just that from now until Election Day. **But our campaign needs the resources that are required to cut through the partisan noise and keep this campaign focused on real issues -- can I count on you to pitch in $10 or whatever you can so we can put that message in front of voters?** **_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_** | | | **[Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2611101/15631798/502996468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWM5ZThiYS02NmNlLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hzfsjMFLvMm4oI5SC7W_0-ESGBjeewDdWCfxwYXXtvk=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181011-mm-4-express-10&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)**

clean_body: | Peter -- The dark-money attacks are now in full swing here in Tennessee. Congresswoman Blackburn, Super PACs, and Washington partisans are flooding the airwaves with millions of dollars in false and misleading attacks against me and my record. Look, I’d rather be talking about ideas: how to expand health care access, how to make college more affordable, and how to stop the opioid epidemic. While the Washington swamp wants to dominate this race with hyper-partisan shouting, I want to talk about how to help people -- and I’m going to keep on doing just that from now until Election Day. But our campaign needs the resources that are required to cut through the partisan noise and keep this campaign focused on real issues -- can I count on you to pitch in $10 or whatever you can so we can put that message in front of voters? ---
Peter -
We have them worried. Election Day is fast approaching and New Jersey Democrats are starting to panic. Voters know that Bob Hugin is the better Bob in this race.
As our campaign gains momentum, there continues to be a growing number of Democrats who are publicly endorsing Bob Hugin's campaign.
With public polls showing that the race is a dead heat, Bob Menendez is getting more desperate by the day. Just this week, The Wall Street Journal blasted him for lying about Bob Hugin's record.
Bob Hugin has made over 450 campaign stops and he isn't letting up. With less than four weeks to go, we are working 24/7 to send in a Marine on Election Day.
See updates from our campaign below.
Sarah Neibart
Deputy Campaign Manager

_**"After narrowly dodging a corruption conviction, New Jersey Senator Bob Menendez faces a re-election dogfight against former Celgene CEO Bob Hugin. The Senator is now lying to voters about his opponent’s business record the way he dissembled about his political corruption.** "_ ─ The Wall Street Journal

name: Jason Yates
subject: BREAKING NEWS: Answered Prayers!
body:
| | Pastor Andrew Brunson released from Turkish Prison
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ieA9bJjT-HRR-jhhZwY0QyI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181012news01&n=1)
| Peter, Pastor Andrew Brunson is finally free! Turkey’s bogus charges against Brunson were unfair and tried to paint a faithful servant of Christ as a political bogeyman. The government arrested Brunson in 2016 and for over a year he was held without reason before eventually being charged for creating division in Turkey because he was spreading his Christian faith. Today, the Turkish Court ordered Brunson’s release from house arrest and freed him to return to America. _“I am an innocent man. I love Jesus, I love Turkey.”_
–-Pastor Brunson as he told the court while weeping as the decision was announced. Months ago we called for Christians to boycott Turkish goods and avoid tourist travel to the country. Turkey wasn’t safe for Pastor Brunson, but the risks he took for the sake of the gospel reveal a valiant faithfulness to Christ. Today, we celebrate his release and thank the Trump administration for bringing economic and diplomatic pressure to bear on Turkey. The price of maintaining its sham court case against Brunson was simply too high. We also thank the Trump administration for prioritizing religious freedom. No person of any faith should ever be exploited as a political pawn and President Trump’s fearless support of Pastor Brunson exemplifies his commitment to defending this ideal. Thank you for praying for Pastor Brunson and his family over the months! **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181012news01&n=2)
* * *
[Support My Faith Votes with your tax deductible donation.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66idsHszZ_cNjdrkrk6Ct22R5LqpO-pYuvVIOOj4RsxM_Q&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181012news01&n=3) _My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._
---

name: Bill McKibben
subject: Action unlike anything we've done before
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
I hate to be the bearer of bad news - but in this case, believe me when I say: You cannot afford to tune-out!
#
Friends,
I hate to be the bearer of bad news - but in this case, believe me when I say: You cannot afford to tune-out!
According to the big new UN report on the climate, we're entirely out of years to diddle around and delay. The fossil fuel lobby will do whatever it takes to preserve their business model, even if it means breaking the planet. So we better do whatever we can. I honestly can't think of another issue in more urgent need of a revolution. **This is where you come in:**
In lieu of action by our elected global leaders, the grassroots are stepping up. Our Revolution groups around the country are mobilizing. Nationally, we're throwing our support behind candidates running on clean energy platforms and progressive climate policies. In Wisconsin, we're organizing Climate Marches and electing progressives to the county board. In Hawai'i, our movement volunteers are partnering with environmental groups to pressure local and state government for a transition to 100% renewable energy by 2030. We need to keep it up.
**Your support is critical to help local groups pressure more states into mandating 100% renewable energy by 2030 and to elect progressive leaders with the political will to save our planet.[Can you make a $5 recurring monthly donation today to support Our Revolution's climate activism across the country?](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a895/bed43eb/702be9c0/75fcf50d/879284454/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/act-on-climate?refcode=em181012-rc-full&noskip=true&recurring=true")**
It's time to face facts: The change we need is not coming from those in power. The political power we build - starting at the local level, with great urgency - has the power to change who controls our government. We are the political revolution needed to save our planet.
Nothing we fight for - politics, the economy, jobs, health care - matters without a habitable climate. The United States is the second-largest emitter of fossil fuels in the world - that's partly because our leadership is in the fossil fuel companies' back pockets. **It will take grassroots leaders and a political revolution to lead a global movement to divest our economies from fossil fuels and reimagine a new world in harmony with our environment.** That leadership starts with you.
[**Give $5 or whatever you can afford each month to build our climate movement and political revolution.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a895/bed43eb/702be9c0/75fcf50d/879284454/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/act-on-climate?refcode=em181012-rc-full&noskip=true&recurring=true")
If these findings make you fear for the future, you are not alone. For years, I have been organizing around the world to demand that we finally put people and our planet before profits, and I am terrified at the prospects detailed in the UN's report. I would not be asking for your support if it were not so necessary and urgent.
Thank you for joining me in taking action.
In solidarity,
Bill McKibben
President
350.org
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a895/bed43eb/702be9c0/75fcf50d/879284454/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/act-on-climate?refcode=em181012-rc-full&noskip=true&recurring=true")**

Friends, I hate to be the bearer of bad news - but in this case, believe me when I say: You cannot afford to tune-out! According to the big new UN report on the climate, we're entirely out of years to diddle around and delay. The fossil fuel lobby will do whatever it takes to preserve their business model, even if it means breaking the planet. So we better do whatever we can. I honestly can't think of another issue in more urgent need of a revolution. This is where you come in: In lieu of action by our elected global leaders, the grassroots are stepping up. Our Revolution groups around the country are mobilizing. Nationally, we're throwing our support behind candidates running on clean energy platforms and progressive climate policies. Hello,

With just over three weeks to go, we don't even need to tell you that Election Day is right around the corner.

Our grassroots organizing team has really stepped it up lately -- last week we knocked 27,000 doors and made 63,000 phone calls.

From the very beginning, we wanted to turn our momentum into action across North Carolina -- and we're doing that neighborhood by neighborhood.

**But we need to keep this going. We're aiming to raise $50,000 by October 17th to make sure we have the resources down the stretch to be successful. Friend,

Our next debate is around the corner and I can't wait.

It will be great to have the chance to share my vision with the people of Wisconsin who may not have heard it yet.

And friend, I will NOT miss the chance to point out how Tammy Baldwin has failed Wisconsin in the Senate.
[SUPPORT LEAH: CHIP IN $50 >>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=46df842db89246369484819249495e66&_e=bOCGpm-ae0pd9nPb9VJZRJNZyIkODfW9ncRxB8lIzyDHdgtFQKhBLn3cT61dlLEjO9q488OOxPbH-jk3xfZn8vhxudYuvndtrlac0OHpqSbn0zHqr7hM3KUn3Q4YByLbPe6Cv1gDKjql144KSCw2xgHbFQOAxOgClops9KzMrMyociFFpJ8LU1QEs39AE92hgBy4V7i9yztyRA1kca2t57onlnCuafHKeZclz4gSZQG8zzOYWNJN3UhAxWMQtZ7cTc2RRJ7lyLutAzhd5h91qkZkhHmgAZec_6fuGNnB7lFiXQGUpCzzCYKkksud0iKcxvku19OIex2KdMBB6g4q2BmYHBG1sdUBuaEpSFvhMMi1Kx-gxjIiIypde1aOwwk7haMkii9rWrfRwAG4CsFVh2HQbHFn8A6442Y7rhZ1eI9SB9q13iNi5-Ts-W2BOxZz)

Tammy Baldwin voted against Judge Neil Gorsuch, and she sided with the radical leftists who obstructed Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation hearings.

She repeatedly votes to spend our money recklessly and refuses to support tax cuts.

She's campaigned for a single-payer, government-run, socialized healthcare system.

And let's not forget how she did nothing when she learned that veterans were over prescribed opioids at the Tomah VA, and then offered a staffer hush money and hired Hillary Clinton’s lawyer to cover it all up.

Tammy CANNOT hide from her record, and this debate is our chance to make sure people know exactly how little Tammy has done for Wisconsin.

I'm looking forward to it, friend. And I want YOUR help to get the word out.

[**Can you chip in $50 today to make sure we can share our message before the debate and keep up the heat when it's over?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=46df842db89246369484819249495e66&_e=LoRd_EYFROSJFCbmLGb4PfuUbab1RG0D13Itt4QurSenz3cKhBlZXgwtUjsiB9DDgEGuUvEJ7-XRKcIXLoTHG1cUv9GjCaCEXjKjA4RgwhdbwEwxpg--Ou6UeaJvc14p0tWSsqH5g5DT7lMlbWW1GcZ3oPslcsvYewtYbpT4RyefW62BmXJRY_ysuDN0v9vXnSoKhiDQYZvrnYyypr3HIZIC7zz10_5Pf3fQu_VUMc3mIvvXq7lFYlKPYJCOqKjgAr5kvoE3Boj5R0GH1iqmZiukq9gBY8EBU3LHGFBsSp7FTQ36L52MgMl46KuIqbFiCFxs-AeMKKPUyNTbBQgk-pwESr4nyYjz-qawiGxW6PNVK9OnAESprhLKFkrgE8Spx56lTrygyEMUBrR4MoiQJhSrTTrhk8jWl3CMYo8AiGA9nsO3NljwaWWUhbW634pn)

I know the people of Wisconsin have a critical choice to make this year when it comes to choosing a candidate for Senate. And friend, in the debates, I'll prove that I'm the only one who can deliver the effective change the Senate so desperately needs.

I hope you have a chance to tune in and watch!

And please, chip in now to make sure EVERYONE sees exactly what we have to say on Saturday!

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=46df842db89246369484819249495e66&_e=Bv0VGXwj6_m3L0c30MEBD3V0GDi9gq3H0Y2o5pJkd1LrSoR3t1CDDljwnO5-J4IudZy2XW-GMEl6gosKUMiykZ3lVbc-vU4Ur6ODQsKir2f1GaOnqQTHUeFLENaPc7muWx7HktnvPt4T-seW0C7sKsLZ-UERZF7uem4Dq1yBHfpE-8p2Vo7d8p-CXA6Vp982jAxqtl1nHs_O4QMZosQQCszNWBkVQd68toWZXKxSB9gRdTtj0XcZI7E-q1QrkgVY). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=46df842db89246369484819249495e66&_e=bOCGpm-ae0pd9nPb9VJZRNhuuz9-y3q87sS6Pbzr_gHN2JLgMGCdvF7TM363RMYXkds1rRCDaUhsGQU8zwhUhrQJjHiOm3ve-RnLgsEVncxuIDMIghG9VmGlIVpr_SJiTpNoYNQJTqrVnW_FlD3s6J7T1sIJ6rypD7AtVket4t6oq28E3c9pHAzdKN_PaJdBiPcry5oe7yDKPRjYTCRrpiEaaptfLfOUUWmeFMHdBtIMvu2mS59Lml1oOAgAyzK6AdfuDaxrZ8lt7AN947ua74tT3z3TJfidtLNcQSqhWkX_oh1mf_jPLYNK-Yj3TEGSjPDbi844SpzpTd-9S-1D3b4mH9rrWXs0nmML-yJoGzpytx8zPeJezbE8C7f-Ix9E) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=46df842db89246369484819249495e66&_e=bOCGpm-ae0pd9nPb9VJZRNhuuz9-y3q87sS6Pbzr_gHZWHtMIClBQWSH2hfSMow05JPi3P_s38pDD7oLX7oUMRrrjxd_DP2wGb5GFOZTpzdbiV00sOjG4qQePgBb7UbGb8uEERhecME98_UJR2XDiPTYi-DiMcnxsufc5yeaVB0WOQ4dDF6VDJMSLeevjKfgk8c6SmOq_K65Ixn07Gmn-JXxviq2vTbmUdBW8HSKS8Cv4GcD5TCdQdqAXwTQzGd2KVvfm-hS3UFOJ6BmV9voZ4UlWwV6dJI7hALShBbkcpeg3wO5wTBZ3T7swqePZCXGz7TgwJNRTUM2vTgf73pnWfC0QzankZDQBLPj1Is-vXNTwM_wJ-tMz0chvMTQcTW4) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=46df842db89246369484819249495e66&_e=bOCGpm-ae0pd9nPb9VJZRDHqLu5eAUiIrTvFKjw2FDqHf2CskdXrfHdtAEEOgl1xKnlPxsYB07QPqBbCXiyvE2inuhmfO2grYMfBuLRhnVfeEX6Q3no6rPGcXkBOecJNjHBn8OLX2rQFyYVRrE-C8T-i5R_IvYhfRr3LSciUGOvrXvdApdL17v9-wv93NsVQT_8syYYXLh32DG_GgFPOaf46ocfLltP1LnomYtJer9FIbn0in5sufqS5FaN7lL5nin0wajlHTX9Q4V1y_03ZNA%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=46df842db89246369484819249495e66&_e=bOCGpm-ae0pd9nPb9VJZREzBT9V7YdGkCF8uAh12fB-whl2ItP48Ki6K_ghrR2IAc1OhDaWpWSIBuMWEtcQ1xl3gx8bBh7WtyNLZG_oFwZbggrWEjfJkHvQ_1X31r23253stA05i0mTYmhHnn-44yL8QxbVkbpXUCOc1q0-RTBzhqQ_zwy3qTkDVs1OI-HNhGO_16nIUsTgeXTV1HTYi2zMcrfK60MfmBMidsZTkOWrniyK2TAUhtZXurYUK4D5RUD11KvsXj-HAODjRS64mBw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=46df842db89246369484819249495e66&_e=bOCGpm-ae0pd9nPb9VJZRBq6OCSmq_ssiVK90eUzTfamviMHvzFjrWCsYWvUln8TG1ZpdWwvpOI6QYmKfWLJZUlqjDZ-wbkHUBi3zZ5tcWGIlNG5ZDqWC5eysmQfaa8H_BeXWy0EqEitPJGJakO191515YYUnd_wlyOSRYpd74QVqkOgkdKALJ_paNpepZZn29U7ot78cYZ3z9-5M_zE0xaylZVs9ln74pn-h4jLpvcCxCDa3Ft8kSRJURFN2P4fmFQmia5NrwqxfhlZQ4oLaw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=46df842db89246369484819249495e66&_e=bOCGpm-ae0pd9nPb9VJZRNhuuz9-y3q87sS6Pbzr_gH8X8pNCrmBJ57fbywnCsN-3HzDo3BcZOKBw1ZLiK1KAsnujvGXrh0tbvMWGDLY8-o5CjFKWzdL5CqiLqgdJ8qwKUCswnEPqzuVPj8V7cXELtty7cneHCFEddek20zxEu3_iXLSEsp9M7OdElmzW4VzX6ke2t9P6-LtXMKVeq0JheaYT0Zr_8SftAO8_C32sKXjdRUvdzk9-dm8-G7SL9zZvTSoTnWHPpZXuf6x59NAH5k6E1NzcjB9dzERgRwXmFUBtXeymAlExnUjDcdqRCVGTAZCuDLr5omAgOh_c3HMDxHPacw5kArLC0dd1ZJXNhw0bngZ8uKDNGMTqsmVpkpl_T7zrktVKiijRfK7Dy4EKA%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text.
