clean_body: The debate with Tammy Baldwin is just around the corner, and I can't wait. It will be great to have the chance to share my vision with the.... Friend, Our next debate is around the corner and I can't wait. It will be great to have the chance to share my vision with the people of Wisconsin who may not have heard it yet. And friend, I will NOT miss the chance to point out how Tammy Baldwin has failed Wisconsin in the Senate. Tammy Baldwin voted against Judge Neil Gorsuch, and she sided with the radical leftists who obstructed Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation hearings. She repeatedly votes to spend our money recklessly and refuses to support tax cuts. She's campaigned for a single-payer, government-run, socialized healthcare system. And let's not forget how she did nothing when she learned that veterans were over prescribed opioids at the Tomah VA, and then offered a staffer hush money and hired Hillary Clinton’s lawyer to cover it all up. Tammy CANNOT hide from her record, and this debate is our chance to make sure people know exactly how little Tammy has done for Wisconsin. I'm looking forward to it, friend. And I want YOUR help to get the word out. I know the people of Wisconsin have a critical choice to make this year when it comes to choosing a candidate for Senate. And friend, in the debates, I'll prove that I'm the only one who can deliver the effective change the Senate so desperately needs. I hope you have a chance to tune in and watch! And please, chip in now to make sure EVERYONE sees exactly what we have to say on Saturday! Thank you for all of your support. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: rebuild as one Florida family
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Friends, As reports of the devastation of Hurricane Michael continue to come in, our hearts are with all the families who've lost so much. In times of hardship, it's easy for impacted families to feel alone and isolated. But none of them are alone. **We will rebuild together, not as thousands of individual families but as one Florida family. There are many different ways you can get involved.** The [**American Red Cross**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cba/622b7b5b/1d30f410/307b69ca/517705221/VEsH/ "https://www.redcross.org/donate/hurricane-michael-donations.html/") is in Florida helping to distribute necessary supplies and help families recover. [**Habitat for Humanity**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cba/622b7b5b/1d30f410/307b69cd/517705221/VEsE/ "https://www.habitat.org/donate/?link=972")'s disaster relief efforts are focused on the long-term recovery of families and communities impacted by the storm. Charity Navigator has compiled a list of top-rated charities that plan to help the families affected by Hurricane Michael in the coming weeks and months. [**You can click here to view the list and see how you can help.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cba/622b7b5b/1d30f410/307b69cc/517705221/VEsF/ "https://www.charitynavigator.org/index.cfm?bay=content.view&cpid=6806") When I get back to Washington, I will use my position on the Appropriations Committee to ensure our fellow Floridians receive the necessary resources to recover from this devastating storm. Thank you for doing what you can to help. Debbie Wasserman Schultz
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: We're building the largest voter protection effort in the nation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
We will work to process the 53,000 registrations, but we will not wait for justice. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8eb/34a064cc/e347fbf/70d3b26/4230539442/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend - When I saw that Kemp's office was holding up 53,000 voter registration applications, it felt like _d eja vu_. Four years ago, Kemp tried to keep 40,000 new voters off the rolls. A coalition of civil rights groups and the New Georgia Project - an organization I founded to fight voter suppression and register eligible voters - took him to court. Through our efforts, Kemp was forced to restore 33,000 illegally cancelled registrations. It didn't happen overnight, but we beat him. And in August, when a Kemp associate pushed to close polling places in predominantly Black and rural Randolph County, we fought back. And we beat Kemp again! Now, with a tied race and just **25 days** until Election Day, Kemp is once again trying to use his office for political gain by keeping 53,000 new, mostly Black, voters off the rolls. **Let me be clear: We will work to process the 53,000 registrations, but we will not wait for justice. We are already fighting Kemp's latest attempt to suppress voters now, and we will beat Kemp again in November. But we need your help to get it done:** **[Make a $3 donation to our Voter Protection Fund right now to help us fight back against Kemp's attempts to suppress the vote.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8eb/34a064cc/e347fbf/70d3b27/4230539442/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDEyMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-voterprotectionfund?refcode=IE101218-full")** Georgia isn't a "red state." We're a non-voting state. And in 2016, nearly 750,000 eligible Georgia voters stayed home. We won't let that happen again. We must use our voices to amplify those who have been told they cannot vote. **We won't let Kemp silence any Georgian, and we will not let any eligible voter be denied their rights.** In the coming days, lawsuits will be filed against Brian Kemp. Legal battles will rage on. But right now, our focus needs to be on making sure every Georgia voter of good conscience steps up and votes. We've got 25 days left to win, and here's how we'll get it done: We will beat Kemp through vote by mail ballots. We will beat him when in-person early voting starts on October 15. And we'll beat him again on November 6th, if you're willing to stand up and fight with us: **[Chip in to our Voter Protection Fund today so we can make sure every Georgian in every county can access their right to vote.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8eb/34a064cc/e347fbf/70d3b27/4230539442/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDEyMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-voterprotectionfund?refcode=IE101218-full")** We've seen these attacks from Kemp's office before, and we've won every single time. Now, it's time to lay it all on the line and win big for Georgia. Yours in the fight, Stacey Abrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8eb/34a064cc/e347fbf/70d3b27/4230539442/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDEyMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-voterprotectionfund?refcode=IE101218-full")**

|
---

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: not sure where else to turn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi, checking back in.
We're sitting down to evaluate our October fundraising in just a couple of hours, and our numbers are still way under where we need to be today.
Senator Hassan won in 2016 by just 1,017 votes, and her race was historically expensive. Her seat is extremely competitive so falling short of even one goal (yes, even at this stage -- especially at this stage), could mean that we hand this seat to the GOP.
**We 're counting on you, everyone, and we're not sure where else to turn. subject: doors just opened at the Trump rally...

subject: We have to earn it
body:
Tonight, 1,000 Hoosier Republicans will come together for an historic night. Vice President Mike Pence is coming back home again...and he'll share... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=63a93ada89)

|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f949bd7178&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_We Have to Earn It_** Tonight, 1,000 Hoosier Republicans will come together for an historic night. **Vice President Mike Pence** is coming back home again...and he'll share the stage with a few friends.

We're bringing together an all-star crew: **Vice President Pence, RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel, Governor Eric Holcomb, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch, U.S. Senate candidate Mike Braun, Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Auditor Tera Klutz,** and **Treasurer Kelly Mitchell**.

And then we're taking that crew on the road, with the launch on Saturday of the [Right Track Results Tour](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=40edb5b3e8&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Between Saturday and Election Day, our team of proven leaders will be visiting all corners of Indiana talking about the results Republicans are delivering for Hoosiers. Check [RightTrackResults.com](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=74ba1f6907&e=1acd9bb3d6) frequently to see when we'll be in your area (new dates are being added daily!).

In just 25 days, we'll know the results of this year's critical midterm election. We'll know whether **Mike Braun** is our next Senator, we'll know whether we'll maintain control of the U.S. Senate, and we'll know whether **Connie Lawson, Tera Klutz,** and **Kelly Mitchell** will continue to deliver RESULTS at the Statehouse.

But first, we have to earn it. Join us at an upcoming Right Track Results Rally, and don't forget to VOTE! -Kyle Hupfer
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
| **_Skilling Up Indiana's Workforce!_**
Yesterday, Governor Holcomb announced a big new initiative that will be a game-changer when it comes to skilling up Indiana's workforce.

He announced the launch of [Skillfull Indiana](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bb3e0b3e85&e=1acd9bb3d6), a new partnership designed to create better pathways to good jobs for Hoosiers. It comes at a critical time. In the next decade, Indiana will need more than one million skilled workers to fill open jobs and support economic growth.

Skillful, with its strategic partner Microsoft, is a corporate philanthropy which will work with:
* **Indiana employers** to help them recruit and hire with a focus on skills – and encourage them to invest in skill building for their employees
* **Indiana higher education** institutions to help them anticipate economic shifts
* **Professional development coaches** to equip them to connect more Hoosiers with training

Just as Governor Holcomb promised in 2016, he's working on data-driven solutions to Indiana's major issues!
---
|
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
|
---
| **_Braun Takes on Democrat Donnelly in the First Debate!_**
This week the spotlight was on Indiana's U.S. Senate race, as Mike Braun took on Democrat Joe Donnelly and Libertarian Lucy Brenton in the first televised U.S. Senate debate of the general election.

Mike Braun was on the offensive, making it clear that Democrat Joe Donnelly is a vote for obstructionist Democrats – and against Hoosier values! In case you missed Monday’s debate, you can [watch it here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=593443b48e&e=1acd9bb3d6).

But this week’s news from Mike Braun didn’t stop there! He released his [latest ad of the campaign](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8d59588cde&e=1acd9bb3d6) – Record – slamming Democrat Donnelly for his record of voting against Hoosiers.

And he also rolled out an endorsement for the Indiana Manufacturers Association!

Keep an eye out for Mike Braun this weekend, as he joins our statewide Republican team on the road for the launch of the [Right Track Results Tour](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d147828017&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

| **_Early Voting Is Now Open!_** Already know how you plan to vote in this year's general election? Then it's time to VOTE! Early voting is now open across the state.

Not sure where to vote early, or early vote hours in your county? Check [Vote.GOP](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cc78bd9b1f&e=1acd9bb3d6) now to get all the information you need!

| **_Congratulations to Northeast Indiana's New Senator-Elect!_** On Tuesday, the Indiana Republican Party hosted a caucus in Fort Wayne to select the replacement for Senate Pro Temp David Long, who is retiring from the Senate next month.

Republicans in Northeast Indiana selected Allen County Councilman Justin Busch to fill Senator Long's big shoes.

Following the caucus, Chairman Hupfer released this statement: _"As one of the key architects of Indiana's economic transformation, Senator David Long helped orchestrate the policies that took Indiana from a middle-of-the-pack state to its status today as the fiscal envy of the nation. Through his leadership of the Indiana Senate over the last 12 years, Hoosiers have seen the benefits of balanced budgets and responsible government.Senator Long is leaving behind some big shoes, but I'm confident that County Councilman Justin Busch will represent northeast Indiana with Senator Long's same sense of passion and service."_
---

| _**Indiana's****Regulatory**** Climate is TOPS!**_
As word spreads across the country and around the globe, it's no surprise to Hoosiers that Indiana's leading the pack!

But first, we have to earn it. Join us at an upcoming Right Track Results Rally, and don't forget to VOTE! -Kyle Hupfer | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Skilling Up Indiana's Workforce! Yesterday, Governor Holcomb announced a big new initiative that will be a game-changer when it comes to skilling up Indiana's workforce. He announced the launch of , a new partnership designed to create better pathways to good jobs for Hoosiers. It comes at a critical time. In the next decade, Indiana will need more than one million skilled workers to fill open jobs and support economic growth. Skillful, with its strategic partner Microsoft, is a corporate philanthropy which will work with: Indiana employers to help them recruit and hire with a focus on skills – and encourage them to invest in skill building for their employees Indiana higher education institutions to help them anticipate economic shifts Professional development coaches to equip them to connect more Hoosiers with training Just as Governor Holcomb promised in 2016, he's working on data-driven solutions to Indiana's major issues! | | | The Mike Braun Corner | | Braun Takes on Democrat Donnelly in the First Debate! This week the spotlight was on Indiana's U.S. Senate race, as Mike Braun took on Democrat Joe Donnelly and Libertarian Lucy Brenton in the first televised U.S. Senate debate of the general election. Mike Braun was on the offensive, making it clear that Democrat Joe Donnelly is a vote for obstructionist Democrats – and against Hoosier values! In case you missed Monday’s debate, you can . But this week’s news from Mike Braun didn’t stop there! He released his – Record – slamming Democrat Donnelly for his record of voting against Hoosiers. And he also rolled out an endorsement for the Indiana Manufacturers Association! Keep an eye out for Mike Braun this weekend, as he joins our statewide Republican team on the road for the launch of the ! | | | Early Voting Is Now Open! Already know how you plan to vote in this year's general election? Then it's time to VOTE! Early voting is now open across the state. Not sure where to vote early, or early vote hours in your county? Check now to get all the information you need! | "Visit Vote.GOP Now!" | | | Congratulations to Northeast Indiana's New Senator-Elect! On Tuesday, the Indiana Republican Party hosted a caucus in Fort Wayne to select the replacement for Senate Pro Temp David Long, who is retiring from the Senate next month. Republicans in Northeast Indiana selected Allen County Councilman Justin Busch to fill Senator Long's big shoes. Following the caucus, Chairman Hupfer released this statement: "As one of the key architects of Indiana's economic transformation, Senator David Long helped orchestrate the policies that took Indiana from a middle-of-the-pack state to its status today as the fiscal envy of the nation. Through his leadership of the Indiana Senate over the last 12 years, Hoosiers have seen the benefits of balanced budgets and responsible government.Senator Long is leaving behind some big shoes, but I'm confident that County Councilman Justin Busch will represent northeast Indiana with Senator Long's same sense of passion and service." | | | Indiana Fact of the Week | | Indiana's**Regulatory Climate is TOPS! As word spreads across the country and around the globe, it's no surprise to Hoosiers that Indiana's leading the pack! Thanks to our sound fiscal leadership, ranks our state regulatory environment first in the nation! | | Upcoming Republican Events : 2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner : Laconia Festival Booth & Parade : Wabash County Republican Fall Dinner : Bartholomew County Fall Dinner & Silent Auction : Harrison County GOP Fall Dinner : Tippecanoe County Republican Women's Club Chili Cook Off : White County Hog Roast : Annual Kosciusko County Republican Hall of Fame Dinner : Union County Lincoln Day Dinner : Jackson County Republican Party Fall Dinner : Halloween Parade in Corydon : Allen County Bean Dinner : Henry County Republican Club Speech Contest for High School Students | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Secretary of State Connie Lawson Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Senator Todd Young Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Todd Rokita Congresswoman Susan Brooks Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@indiana.gop | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@indiana.gop | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc. 101 W. name: Ryan Mulcahy
subject: voters are VOTING!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
The voter registration deadline here in Arizona is now behind us, which means our campaign is diving head-first into our next -- and by far most important -- task: getting our supporters to the polls
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e9b/1a8421e1/19ab8fbe1/4949c6c8/2234281350/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Team, The voter registration deadline here in Arizona is now behind us, which means our campaign is diving head-first into our next -- and by far most important -- task: _**getting our supporters to the polls to vote for Tom!**_ With 25 days to go until Election Day, you might be wondering: _Isn 't it a bit early to start our get-out-the-vote efforts?_ _**But, no, it 's not!**_ Early voting just got started in Arizona -- which means people are casting their votes, RIGHT NOW, in AZ-01, and it's on us to make sure they cast their votes for Tom! [**Can you make a donation today to support our early vote program? We have a big team on the ground here in the district, identifying which people are most likely to vote early and making sure we reach them before they cast their ballots. **](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.12_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.12_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.12_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$250](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.12_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [Other](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.12_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This might sound like a cliche, team, but this race is really going to come down to turnout. We need to make sure every one of our supporters gets to the polls, because Tom is the most vulnerable Democrat in the House and this thing is really close. _Our far-right opponent Wendy Rogers even recently released a shock poll claiming a small lead._

I know we can do it -- but we need your help! [**Chip in to support our early vote efforts if you can.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.12_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,

Ryan Mulcahy
Campaign Manager

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.12_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

| | | Exciting news - To kick off in-person early voting, Stacey is launching her "We Are Georgia - Our Voices. Our Votes. Our Time" Early Vote Bus Tour! We'll be making stops all over Georgia, because our campaign isn't just showing up on TV. We are showing up where people live and meeting voters where they are. Make your plan to vote early and then come out and meet us on the road! **[Use this map to check where the "We are Georgia" bus will make stops:](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8ec/34a064cc/e0dd906/70d3976/530342913/VEsE/ "https://map.staceyabrams.com/")** [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8ec/34a064cc/e0dd906/70d3976/530342913/VEsF/ "https://map.staceyabrams.com/") **[And please, sign up for a volunteer shift to help us get out the EARLY vote!](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8ec/34a064cc/e0dd906/70d3977/530342913/VEsC/ "https://georgiadems.bsd.net/page/s/volunteer?Source=Abrams")** Early vote is our chance to win this election for Stacey NOW, so we can't waste this opportunity. Between now and Election Day, we will show that we are Georgia - and that it is time to raise our voices up and vote. Hope to see you on the road! \- Team Abrams

name: Volunteer@TimKaine.com
subject: Derek, something easy and effective you can do this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, there are only three days left to register to vote in Virginia. Many Virginians still aren't registered or don't know their options on how to request an absentee ballot. --------
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1006/3e0906/767aae41/3e37984f/1587651082/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&source=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, there are only three days left to register to vote in Virginia. Many Virginians still aren't registered or don't know their options on how to request an absentee ballot if they work on Election Day and can't make it to the polls. We need to reach these prospective voters, Derek. **Which is why we have volunteer operations _all_ over the Commonwealth:** [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1006/3e0906/767aae41/3e37984e/1587651082/VEsE/ "https://timkaine.com/events?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&source=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field") [Interact with this map by clicking here.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1006/3e0906/767aae41/3e37984d/1587651082/VEsF/ "https://timkaine.com/events?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Interact+with+this+map+by+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&source=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field") **Our team will be out on the doors and in communities this weekend to make sure everyone is registered and informed. Here 's why Paula, our volunteer, lends her time on the weekends:** [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1006/3e0906/767aae41/3e37984c/1587651082/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-volunteer-video?refcode=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&source=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field") [Click here to watch our full video on why Paula canvasses in Richmond on the weekends.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1006/3e0906/767aae41/3e379843/1587651082/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-volunteer-video?refcode=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Click+here+to+watch+our+full+video+on+wh&utm_campaign=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&source=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field") Can you spare some time this weekend? Find an event near you: | **ZIP: 20112**
[Wrong zip or not in our records? Click here to update.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1006/3e0906/767aae41/3e379842/1587651082/VEsA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+Wrong+zip+or+not+in+our+records+Click+he&utm_campaign=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&source=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field")
---
**20112, VIRGINIA**
[Click here to find events near you.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1006/3e0906/767aae41/3e379841/1587651082/VEsB/ "https://timkaine.com/events?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+Click+here+to+find+events+near+you&utm_campaign=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&source=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field")
The work we do in these final weeks gives our House candidates in the toughest-to-flip districts the competitive edge they need - it also ensures we can send Tim Kaine back to the Senate, _and not Corey Stewart._

[As always, if you're unable to get out in the field yourself, you can support our on-the-ground efforts directly with a contribution to our Get Out the Vote Fund. Make sure our incredible volunteers have all the best materials they need to get the job done in this critical final weekend.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1006/3e0906/767aae41/3e379845/1587651082/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-volunteer-video?refcode=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11+-+As+always+if+yoursquore+unable+to+get+ou&utm_campaign=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&source=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field")

Derek, democracy is a participation sport. However you can and choose to participate and help out, we appreciate you and are proud to have you on our team.

Let's win this,

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Support-Volunteer-Efforts](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1006/3e0906/767aae41/3e379844/1587651082/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-volunteer-video?refcode=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=12+-+httpssecuretimkainecomSupportVolunteerEf&utm_campaign=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&source=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field")

_Team Kaine_

P.S. Still on the fence about volunteering or looking to learn more about our great volunteers, and personal heroes, on the campaign? [You can watch a video of our volunteer, Paula, knocking doors and talking to her neighbors here.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1006/3e0906/767aae41/3e37985b/1587651082/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-volunteer-video?refcode=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=13+-+You+can+watch+a+video+of+our+volunteer+P&utm_campaign=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&source=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field") Even self-described introverts knock on doors and make a huge difference (and they always turn out to be great at it)!

[**DONATE $5 TO ELECT VA DEMOCRATS**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1006/3e0906/767aae41/3e37985a/1587651082/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-volunteer-video?refcode=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+DONATE+5+TO+ELECT+VA+DEMOCRATS&utm_campaign=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&source=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field")

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1006/3e0906/767aae41/3e37985e/1587651082/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=18+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&source=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1006/3e0906/767aae41/3e37985d/1587651082/VEsHDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=19+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&source=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1006/3e0906/767aae41/3e37985c/1587651082/VEsEBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=20+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field&source=20181012_2_FIELD_TEAM_field") Thanks for having Tim's back!

2001 Jefferson Davis Highway, Suite 909
Arlington, VA 22202

name: Nik, AndrewGillum.com
subject: Hey, I was in a coma
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3691/9e00690/5006a2f5/2401a65b/3361352534/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181012_nikS_fnd_gq_NTL__NS_ettx&source=em18_181012_nikS_fnd_gq_NTL__NS_ettx")
Friends,

Growing up, I was someone who often said: "I don't like politics," but it was a series of unfortunate events that began 10 years ago that made my views change.

In the fall of 2008, my mom came home one evening, and something was off. I soon learned that she had lost her job and our livelihood was at risk.

Our house turned into an apartment, and my room turned into a futon -- all over the course of three years. She later got a job as a public school teacher, but not soon after, my brother and I were driving home from Jacksonville and got into a bad car accident. I was in a coma for two and a half weeks. I had a tracheotomy and surgery on my skull, and was in rehab for the next eight weeks.

**But without my mother's healthcare coverage, I wouldn't have woken up at all.** These events made me realize how lucky I was -- and too many Floridians aren't. Folks need good-paying jobs to support their families, affordable healthcare as a right, not a privilege, and policies from leaders that support working people.

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3691/9e00690/5006a2f5/2401a65a/3361352534/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=13_55_4382&refcode=em18_181012_nikS_fnd_gq_NTL__NS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181012_nikS_fnd_gq_NTL__NS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=2")
These are the reasons why I support Andrew Gillum for Governor -- because this race isn't about me: it's about the issues on the ballot that support families across the state. It's about a Governor who believes that healthcare is a right, not a privilege. It's about a Governor who will fight for our schools, and clean up our environment so future generations have a chance to succeed.

Folks shouldn't have to be "lucky" in order to survive an accident and not come out in massive debt, or grow up on a certain end of the economic ladder in order to succeed -- and Mayor Andrew Gillum gets that.

**[Listen, we're getting to the final stretch of the campaign, and every helping hand matters. Please help us keep the momentum going in these last few weeks by contributing now -- we need your help to do whatever we can to elect a leader with true Florida values this November.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3691/9e00690/5006a2f5/2401a65d/3361352534/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=13_55_4382&refcode=em18_181012_nikS_fnd_gq_NTL__NS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181012_nikS_fnd_gq_NTL__NS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=3+-+FIRSTNAMEListen+were+getting+to+the+fina")**

Let's bring it home,

Nik S.
Press Assistant
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3691/9e00690/5006a2f5/2401a65c/3361352534/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=13_55_4382&refcode=em18_181012_nikS_fnd_gq_NTL__NS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181012_nikS_fnd_gq_NTL__NS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=4+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3691/9e00690/5006a2f5/2401a65f/3361352534/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_181012_nikS_fnd_gq_NTL__NS_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3691/9e00690/5006a2f5/2401a65e/3361352534/VEsA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_181012_nikS_fnd_gq_NTL__NS_ettx&source=em18_181012_nikS_fnd_gq_NTL__NS_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3691/9e00690/5006a2f5/2401a651/3361352534/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_181012_nikS_fnd_gq_NTL__NS_ettx&source=em18_181012_nikS_fnd_gq_NTL__NS_ettx")
